scripts.set:secret: node -e "const r=require('readline').createInterface({input:process.stdin,output:process.stdout});r.question('Enter new JWT secret: ',s=>{if(!s.trim()){console.error('Aborted: empty secret.');process.exit(1)}const f='packages/server/.env',fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/^JWT_SECRET=.*/m,'JWT_SECRET='+s.trim()));console.log('JWT_SECRET updated.');r.close()})"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client
